title: Pickles to Skellys
description: Client-side Fabric mod for Donut SMP that disguises sea pickles as skeleton spawners and iron chestplates as elytras.
body:
# Donut SMP Mod

A client-side Fabric mod that retextures and renames specific items to match Donut SMP conventions.

If you find a problem in the mod dm me @minethecraft on Discord!

## What it does

| Item | Looks like | Reads as |
|------|-----------|----------|
| Sea Pickle | Spawner (3D cage block) | **Spawner** (purple) with **Skeleton** (yellow) lore |
| Iron Chestplate | Elytra | **Elytra** |

### Sea Pickle → Skeleton Spawner
- Inventory icon renders as a 3D spawner cage
- Placed blocks render as spawners
- Has swirling skelly inside
- Place/break sounds use metal sounds (matching real spawners)
- Tooltip matches Donut SMP format:
  - "Spawner" in purple
  - "Skeleton" in yellow
  - "Interact with Spawn Egg:" / "Sets Mob Type" at the bottom

### Iron Chestplate → Elytra
- Inventory icon shows the elytra sprite
- Tooltip reads "Elytra"

## Installation

1. Install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/) for Minecraft 1.21.1
2. Install [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
3. Drop `donut-smp-mod-1.0.0.jar` into your `mods` folder

No resource pack needed — all assets are built into the mod.

## Notes

- Client-side only — other players won't see your changes unless they also have the mod
- F3+H advanced tooltips will show spoofed item IDs (`minecraft:spawner`, `minecraft:elytra`)
